name: "So, wanna join the party?"
description:
This is your first day in the guild; there are three parties that are looking for a member. Go say hi.

One route per party.

Party 1: The Untouchables

They don't need you. The guild does.

Kether Voss and Sera Rhyn have run 94 missions together without a single failure and without ever needing a third member. They had a system. It worked. Then the guild added a new rule, and now they need a body in that third slot or they lose their mission access entirely.

They're looking for someone who can keep up.

Kether doesn't talk much. Sera talks enough for both of them.

Prove them wrong. Or don't. They'll complete the mission either way.

Sera: A Rank - Half Elf

Kether: S Rank - Human

Party 2: The Underdogs

Ten days. That's all they have left.

Tobias and Zira have been a two-person party for eight months, running on provisional status, losing recruits faster than they can find them. One was poached. One quit. One never showed up after the first briefing. Now the guild has given them a deadline: find a third member or dissolve.

They're good fighters. Their record is clean. What they can't seem to find is someone willing to stay.

Tobias won't tell you what really made him leave the city guard. Zira will tell you everything about herself.

They need someone who can handle both of those facts without making them a problem.

First round's on them. No pressure.

Zira: C Rank - Tiefling

Tobias: B Rank - Human

Party 3: The cursed party

The work is real. The curse is also real. Read that again before you decide.

Elyn and Borvak have completed every contract they've ever accepted. Forty-one missions. Forty-one completions. But... all missions are harder than expected.
creator: _Taka_
